columns.name: aar

columns.description: Foreign key number, possibly referencing another table

columns.name: antall
columns.description: Quantity of the item or service

columns.description: Flag indicating if the party has been scrapped or not

columns.name: merknad_avd
columns.description: Additional notes related to the address

columns.description: Audit take, possibly indicating an audit trail or checkpoint

columns.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the record was changed, possibly used for versioning or auditing purposes
